research_history_boundary.support_only_values_seen: current-bar ticket, flow, response distributions and event counts; no entry-to-exit price, future OHLC, funding PnL, return, CAGR, or MDD

nearest_failed_families.Coinbase_leadership: venue return/activity leadership, not ticket migration
nearest_failed_families.CSPR_RIFT: cash/perp flow rejection and path-quality transitions

novelty_boundary.distinct_axis: relative average individual Spot-versus-USD-M trade ticket size and its abrupt one-hour migration shock

source_contract.source_gap_policy: quarantine every incomplete Spot bucket, each verified USD-M source-ID-gap UTC day, every missing USD-M feature bucket, and the following 24 five-minute bars; never impute

claim_boundary.claim: an abrupt cross-venue migration in average individual ticket size, when accepted by coherent same-venue price response, may identify which venue's flow leads the next one-day repricing
not_claimed: one ticket equals one parent order
Spot and USD-M trade records have identical matching semantics

causal_feature_contract.perp_ticket: USD-M quote_notional[t] / inclusive underlying trade-ID count[t]
causal_feature_contract.spot_branch: r[t] >= prior q95 and dr[t] >= prior q97.5; Spot coherence and signed price response each >= own prior q75; side=sign(Spot flow)
causal_feature_contract.perp_branch: r[t] <= prior q5 and dr[t] <= prior q2.5; USD-M coherence and signed price response each >= own prior q75; side=sign(USD-M flow)
causal_feature_contract.baseline: all thresholds use only clean t-8640..t-1 observations and require at least 2016 observations
causal_feature_contract.episode: either branch active at t and neither branch active at t-1

execution_contract.entry: t+2 open, leaving one full five-minute computation bar
execution_contract.exit: scheduled open after 288 held five-minute bars
execution_contract.funding: exact realized BTCUSDT settlement rates on [entry, exit)
execution_contract.strict_mdd: global/pre-entry high-water; entry cost; favorable-before-adverse held OHLC; exact funding; hypothetical liquidation and exit cost
execution_contract.cagr_clock: full wall-clock split including warm-up and idle cash

support_freeze_before_returns.failure_action: reject without opening any strategy outcome

falsification_controls.direction_flip: same primary clock, exact opposite side
falsification_controls.no_ticket_level: own clock with q95/q5 ticket level removed
falsification_controls.no_ticket_shock: own clock with q97.5/q2.5 one-hour shock removed
falsification_controls.no_coherence: own clock with dominant-venue coherence removed
falsification_controls.no_price_acceptance: own clock with signed-response threshold removed
falsification_controls.other_venue_side: same clock, side from the non-dominant venue flow
falsification_controls.one_hour_signal_delay: same branch side and hold, signal shifted 12 bars
falsification_controls.one_day_shifted_clock: same branch side and hold, signal shifted 288 bars
falsification_controls.mechanism_gate: primary train and 2023 CAGR-MDD must beat every component removal; one-hour, one-day, or random-side full qualification rejects

rejection_contract: any support or pre-2024 performance failure retires VTMS-288; do not change its sign, thresholds, delay, hold, costs, or gates
